expectations.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for what could be causing the bug
expectations.evidence: Lists 4 hypotheses: H1 (overflow:hidden clipping), H2 (card children overflowing border-radius), H3 (combination of H1+H2), H4 (box-shadow clipping creating illusion of square corners)

expectations.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
expectations.evidence: Designs 3 experiments: Experiment 1 (add overflow:hidden to .card to test H2), Experiment 2 (remove overflow:hidden from .content-area to test H1/H4), Experiment 3 (discriminating test applying both changes)

expectations.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
expectations.evidence: Step 5 'Analysis and Findings' provides CSS specification reasoning to confirm H2/H3, explaining how child backgrounds overflow the rounded corners and how the parent's overflow:hidden changes compositing.

expectations.text: Correctly identifies overflow: hidden on the parent .content-area as the cause of clipped corners
expectations.evidence: Identifies overflow:hidden on .content-area as the environmental trigger, and also notes the card's missing overflow:hidden as the complementary cause

expectations.text: Fix modifies Layout.css rather than Card.css
expectations.evidence: Primary fix in Layout.css changes overflow:hidden to overflow-x:hidden. Also recommends Card.css change as complementary.
